chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No.S-526 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Disposed of Matter. 1. For orders on CMA No.8115/2025 2. For orders on CMA No.8116/2025 17.11.2025. Mr. Rahim Ali Rind, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------------------------------------ 1. Urgency is granted. 2. This petition was disposed of vide order dated 30.06.2025, whereby the respondents were directed to provide due protection to the petitioner as and when required. The petitioner has now filed this contempt application on the ground that encroachment is not being removed in Kohkan Muslim Cooperative Housing Society, Sector 20-A, Scheme 33. Learned counsel contends that the petitioner is being accused of raising the encroachment. Perusal of the record shows that no case for initiating contempt proceedings is made out. Accordingly, the contempt application is hereby dismissed, and costs of Rs. 2,000/- are imposed on the petitioner, to be deposited in the High Court Clinic Fund of this Court. JUDGE
